description: Real-time threat intelligence lookups and IOC parsing from your self-hosted Polarity instance.
name: io.github.radar989/polarity-mcp

environmentVariables.description: The base URL of your Polarity server, e.g. https://polarity.yourcompany.com
environmentVariables.name: POLARITY_SERVER_URL

environmentVariables.description: A Polarity API key. Generate one in Polarity under Settings > API Keys.
environmentVariables.name: POLARITY_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' if your Polarity server uses a self-signed certificate.
environmentVariables.name: POLARITY_IGNORE_SSL

environmentVariables.description: Timeout in milliseconds for Polarity API requests. Defaults to 30000 (30 seconds). Increase for slow integrations.
environmentVariables.name: POLARITY_TIMEOUT_MS

title: Polarity
